zh.lifeSummary: 當Richgard vom Lavanthtal於大約1025年出生在奧地利亞特時，她的父親Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal22歲，母親Luitgarde D'ISTRIE22歲。她於1040年與Siegfried I. von Spanheim在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀斯朋海姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1072年7月9日在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀斯朋海姆享年48歲，埋葬在奧地利亞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richgard vom Lavanthtal于大约1025年出生在奥地利亞特时，她的父亲Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal22岁，母亲Luitgarde D'ISTRIE22岁。她于1040年与Siegfried I. von Spanheim在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀斯朋海姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1072年7月9日在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀斯朋海姆享年48岁，埋葬在奥地利亞特。

nameMeanings.name: vom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Korean and Chinese: variant of   Yum  .
Cambodian: written យ៉ុម, unexplained.

variants.name: Yum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyung, Young, Dong, Doo, Ho, Jung, Kyoung, Byoung, Chang, Chang Soon, Chang Yong, Chong, Choong, Chung Nam, Heung, Hyum, Jaehyun, Jin Suk, Kiho, Kum, Pyong, Sang Chul, Sang Soo, Seong.

Korean (Yŏm): there is only one Yŏm clan. It was originally known as the Yŏm family from Tanwŏn County (Kyŏnggi Province), but the name of this county was changed to P’aju County. The Yŏm family was very influential throughout the Koryŏ Kingdom until Yŏm Hŭng-bang, a powerful court official, was executed for treason by the Koryŏ King U (1374–87). The clan never recovered its former glory.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 任, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Ren   1.

nameMeanings.name: Richgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richgard vom Lavanthtal was born about 1025, in Carinthia, Austria, her father, Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal, was 22 and her mother, Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, was 22. She married Siegfried I. von Spanheim in 1040, in Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 9 July 1072, in Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 48, and was buried in Carinthia, Austria.

fr.Zabarino, Ukraine: Zabarino, Zachepylivka, Kharkiv, Ukraine, Union soviétique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richgard vom Lavanthtal est née environ 1025, à Kärnten, Autriche, son père, Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Siegfried I. von Spanheim en 1040, à Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1072, à Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Kärnten, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richgard vom Lavanthtal um 1025 in Kärnten, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal 22 und ihre Mutter Luitgarde D'ISTRIE 22. Sie hat 1040 in Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Siegfried I. von Spanheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. Juli 1072 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen und wurde in Kärnten, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richgard vom Lavanthtal è nata il circa 1025 nel Carinzia, Austria, sua padre, Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Siegfried I. von Spanheim nel 1040, nel Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 9 luglio 1072, nel Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Carinzia, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Richgard vom Lavanthtalが約1025年にオーストリアクaルンテンで生まれた時，父Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertalは22歳，母Luitgarde D'ISTRIEは22歳であった。1040年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレウズナチスプオンヘイムでSiegfried I. von Spanheimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1072年7月9日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレウズナチスプオンヘイムで48歳で死去し，オーストリアクaルンテンにて埋葬された。

ko.Zabarino, Ukraine: 소련 우크라이나 Харківська область Зачепилівський 자버리노
ko.lifeSummary: Richgard vom Lavanthtal(이)가 대략 1025년 오스트리아 ka른텐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luitgarde D'ISTRIE(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1040년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레우즈나치 스폰하임에서 Siegfried I. von Spanheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1072년 7월 9일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레우즈나치 스폰하임에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 ka른텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richgard vom Lavanthtal nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Kärnten, Áustria, seu pai, Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Siegfried I. von Spanheim em 1040, em Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1072, em Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Kärnten, Áustria.

ru.Zabarino, Ukraine: забарино, Зачепиловский, Харьковская область, Украина, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richgard vom Lavanthtal родилась около 1025 г. в местности кaрнтен, Австрия, её отцу по имени Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siegfried I. von Spanheim в 1040 г. в местности споним, креузнач, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 9 июля 1072 г. в местности споним, креузнач, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности кaрнтен, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richgard vom Lavanthtal nació aproximadamente 1025, en Kärnten, Austria, su papá, Engelbert IV. Graf im Pustertal, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Luitgarde D'ISTRIE, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Siegfried I. von Spanheim en 1040, en Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 9 de julio de 1072, en Sponheim, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Kärnten, Austria.
